subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath manifested the Path and sent down the Proof, and caused all things to cry out with their most exalted call: "There is no God..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی اظهر السبیل و انزل الدلیل و انطق الاشیاء باعلی الندآء انه لا اله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for teaching, @proclamation to the people of the world, @power of the Manifestation of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
